page: Vultr vbm-24c-384gb-amd5 is a bare metal server configured with an AMD EPYC 9255 processor based on the x86_64 architecture. This system provides 24 physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz, paired with 384.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz. Local storage is supplied by a 960 GB NVMe SSD, and the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. There are no dedicated GPUs bundled with this server.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong multi-core capabilities. Memory performance is characterized by top-tier Passmark memory scores and strong read-only bandwidth for both small and large blocks, though large-block memory write bandwidth is average. Cryptographic and compression operations perform in the top tier, as evidenced by high single-threaded gzip and bzip3 decompression rates.

Database and web serving workloads show strong throughput, with high Redis SET operations and top-tier static web serving performance. The hardware profile offers high resource density, combining fast DDR5 memory with bare-metal CPU execution, which provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive applications. This server is suited for database hosting, memory-cached web serving, and local LLM inference using small to medium models.
description: Vultr vbm-24c-384gb-amd5 is a bare metal server featuring an AMD EPYC 9255 processor with 24 physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at 3.2 GHz. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of DDR5 memory and a 960 GB NVMe SSD, with no integrated GPU. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU execution, strong multi-core performance, and top-tier memory scores, alongside strong database operations and static web serving throughput. Large-block memory write bandwidth represents a minor tradeoff, performing in the average tier. This server provides a high-density, bare-metal environment suitable for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and web serving workloads.
og_description: Vultr vbm-24c-384gb-amd5 is a bare metal server featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 960 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier single-core and strong database benchmark performance.

tagline: A bare metal server combining forty-eight vCPUs with high-speed DDR5 memory and NVMe storage for memory-intensive workloads.
